good.bisect-angle: Use the drag-and-drop functionality to adjust the angle bisector by clicking and dragging the circle representing the angle.
good.choose-list: Ensure the dropdown list is focused before selecting an option by clicking on the select element itself, then navigate to the desired option using keyboard arrows or click directly.
good.click-button-sequence: Click the button with the label 'TWO' next after clicking the button with the label 'ONE'
good.click-collapsible-nodelay: Click the accordion header (h3 element with class 'ui-accordion-header') before clicking the collapsible button (button with class 'secondary-action') to expand the section.
good.click-collapsible: Click the header of the collapsible section to expand it before clicking the arrow icon.
good.click-link: Click the div with the class 'alink' containing the text 'magna.'
good.click-scroll-list: Click the submit button after selecting the desired option in the dropdown list.
good.click-tab-2-medium: Switch to Tab #1 first, then click on the link 'magna' within the `alink` span.
good.click-tab: Click the tab labeled 'tab' by default, which is the first tab in the unordered list with class 'ui-tabs-nav'.
good.click-widget: Click the radio button with the highest bid value among those that are visible and have focus.
good.draw-line: Scroll the view up by 200 pixels and then click on the submit button.
good.enter-password: Focus on the second password input field after filling the first one, then proceed to fill the second field and click the submit button.
good.enter-text-2: Type the text 'KELI' into the input field with ID 'tt' and then click the submit button with ID 'subbtn'.
good.enter-text: Click the submit button after filling the input field with the desired text.
good.focus-text-2: Ensure you use the correct bid ('14') for focusing the third input field, as indicated by the successful attempt.
good.focus-text: Focus the input field with the appropriate id ('tt') using the 'focus' action.
good.form-sequence-2: Click the second radio button to select option '2' and then enter '47' in the second text input.
good.generate-number: Click the 'Generate' button to generate a random number less than 8, then click the 'Submit' button.
good.multi-orderings: Focus on the Genre input field (bid=41) and enter 'action'. Then, click the submit button (bid=42).
good.phone-book: Click on the pagination control to navigate to the second page and then click on the address link to view Gabriel's address.
good.read-table-2: Focus the 'First name' input field and fill it with the correct value from the table before submitting the form.
good.simple-arithmetic: Focus the input field for the math answer and then enter the correct value '9' before clicking the submit button.
good.text-transform: Ensure the input field is focused and then submit the form by clicking the submit button after entering 'VJ8' in the input field.
good.use-colorwheel-2: Focus on the color input field, activate the color picker by hovering over it, and then click the submit button to complete the task.
good.click-checkboxes-large: Click the 'Submit' button after ensuring all required checkboxes are checked.
good.click-checkboxes-soft: Focus on the 'flames' checkbox first by clicking on it with bid 40, then click the submit button with id 'subbtn'.
good.copy-paste: Focus on the input field with id 'answer-input' and paste the text from the textarea into it.
good.email-inbox: Focus on the email thread for Tiffanie and then click the Trash icon within that thread to delete the email.
good.enter-text-dynamic: Focus the text input field and then click the submit button to trigger the form submission.
good.identify-shape: Hover over the SVG text 'G' and then click the 'Triangle' button.
good.login-user: Ensure the password field is filled correctly before clicking the login button.
good.read-table: Focus the input field for the last name and then click the submit button.
good.tic-tac-toe: After placing your mark, ensure you strategically place your next move to form a potential winning line or block the opponent's potential winning move.
good.use-autocomplete: Focus on the search input field with ID 'tags' and enter the value 'Afghanistan'. Since autocomplete is disabled, ensure the input field retains focus before attempting to click the submit button.
